name: Abhiuday Pratap Singh
tagline: Full‑Stack Engineer • AI Enthusiast • Product Thinker
bio: Passionate developer who builds intelligent, data‑driven products. Experienced across AI/ML, backend, frontend, and product management.

details: Led the design & implementation of a micro‑service architecture serving 200k+ monthly users.
Integrated ML models with REST APIs, reducing inference latency by 40%.
Mentored a team of 4 junior developers.
Developed end‑to‑end pipelines for computer‑vision projects using PyTorch.
Published 2 internal white‑papers on model interpretability.

projects.title: Travel Advisor Agent
projects.description: AI‑powered travel recommendation platform with dynamic itinerary generation.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Responsive, cinematic‑style personal portfolio using Flask, HTML, CSS, and JS.

leadership.title: Finance Committee Head
